title: Lily's Rainbow of Feelings
synopsis: Follow little Lily as she experiences different emotions throughout her day, each represented by beautiful colors. From happy yellow sunshine to sad blue rain, Lily learns that all feelings are okay and make her special rainbow complete.

pages.text: This is Lily. She feels many colors today!

illustration.description: Lily with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes stands in the center surrounded by swirling rainbow colors representing different emotions
illustration.alt: Lily surrounded by colorful emotion swirls

pages.text: When Lily is happy, she feels bright yellow like sunshine! Yellow makes her smile big.

illustration.description: Lily with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes laughing joyfully with bright yellow sunshine rays and golden sparkles swirling around her
illustration.alt: Happy Lily with yellow sunshine colors

pages.text: When Lily feels sad, she sees soft blue like gentle rain. Blue hugs make her feel better.

illustration.description: Lily with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes sitting quietly with soft blue raindrops and gentle blue clouds floating around her
illustration.alt: Sad Lily with blue rain colors

pages.text: When Lily gets mad, she feels red like fire! Red is hot and strong and loud.

illustration.description: Lily with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes with a frustrated expression surrounded by swirling red flames and angry red zigzag patterns
illustration.alt: Mad Lily with red fire colors

pages.text: All of Lily's feelings make a beautiful rainbow. Every color is special, just like Lily!

illustration.description: Lily with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes dancing happily under a magnificent rainbow with all emotion colors blending together harmoniously
illustration.alt: Lily celebrating under her rainbow of feelings

metadata.illustrationStyle: emotion mapped colors, angry red swirls, sad blue rain, happy yellow sunshine, abstract emotion backgrounds, Inside Out inspired, feeling visualization, color psychology

questions.question: What color does Lily feel when she's happy?
questions.explanation: Lily feels bright yellow like sunshine when she's happy!

questions.question: What color does Lily feel when she's sad?
questions.explanation: Lily feels soft blue like gentle rain when she's sad.

questions.question: What do all of Lily's feelings make together?
questions.explanation: All of Lily's colorful feelings make a beautiful rainbow!
